system.description: Human Forming Essence (Transformative Substance): This is used by some demons (or Spirited Beasts) to take human form (particularly snake demons). Most versions of this require human Qi energy or blood. It requires daily preparation and use, and allows any non-human creature that ingests it to become human for 24 hours. The effect increases by an hour each time they take it. During the 24 hour period they can shift between human and beast form as desired. The TN for making it is TN 7.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
system.duration: 24 hours, increasing by one hour with each use
system.effects: Allows a non-human creature to become human and shift between human and beast form.
